servinfo.title: Abnormal noise
servinfo.ptxt: This section describes trouble diagnosis of the P/S system parts whose trouble is not indicated by SUZUKI scan tool. When no malfunction is indicated by the SUZUKI scan tool and steering basic parts as described in Steering Symptom Diagnosis are all in good condition, check the following power steering system parts which may be possible causes for each trouble symptom of steering.

attention3.ptxt: Perform Steering Force Check and Front Wheel Alignment Inspection and Adjustment before diagnosis.

ps.ptxt: P/S motor (built in steering column assembly) malfunction
